Place your resume file in this folder (public/) with this EXACT name:

Azhar_Zia_Resume_ATS (1).pdf

Vite copies everything in /public to the site root untouched at build time,
so the file will be reachable at:  https://yourdomain.com/Azhar_Zia_Resume_ATS (1).pdf

The download button in src/components/ResumeDownload.jsx already points to
this exact filename (URL-encoded). No code changes needed — just drop the
PDF in here and delete this note.
